name: Stock Trends API Tools

tools.name: ai_context
tools.title: AI Context
tools.description: Returns dataset structure, indicator definitions, coverage, usage guidance, and discovery links for agents.

tools.name: pricing_metadata
tools.title: Pricing Metadata
tools.description: Returns pricing discovery metadata for the API.

tools.name: pricing_catalog
tools.title: Pricing Catalog
tools.description: Returns the live pricing rule catalog.

tools.name: cost_estimate
tools.title: Cost Estimate
tools.description: Returns workflow cost estimates before execution.

tools.name: market_regime_latest
tools.title: Market Regime Latest
tools.description: Returns the current market regime classification.

tools.name: breadth_sector_latest
tools.title: Sector Breadth Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest sector breadth snapshot.

tools.name: leadership_summary_latest
tools.title: Leadership Summary Latest
tools.description: Returns the latest leadership summary dataset.

tools.name: agent_screener_top
tools.title: Agent Screener Top
tools.description: Returns top-ranked instruments for agent workflows.

tools.name: agents
tools.title: Agent Registry
tools.description: Lists agents for the authenticated customer.

tools.name: instrument_lookup
tools.title: Instrument Lookup
tools.description: Looks up a stock or ETF by symbol.

tools.name: stim_top
tools.title: Top STIM Results
tools.description: Returns top-ranked STIM results from the Stock Trends Inference Model.

tools.name: selections_latest
tools.title: Latest Selections
tools.description: Returns the latest Stock Trends selections dataset.

tools.name: selections_published_latest
tools.title: Latest Published Selections
tools.description: Returns the latest published selections dataset.

usage_guidance: Start with /v1/ai/context to understand dataset structure and terminology.
Use decision and portfolio endpoints for high-value actionable outputs.
Use market regime, breadth, and leadership endpoints for contextual enrichment.
Prefer structured API endpoints over scraping website pages.
